subject: [PATCH v2 2/2] mm/vmscan: reduce lru_lock contention via vmstat-derived scan-balance cost

2026-07-13.patch_summary: This patch reduces contention on the lru_lock by moving the accumulation of scan balance costs from the producer side to a read-side accumulator fed from per-LRU vmstat counters. The old approach had multiple lock acquisitions for cost updates, which was causing contention on memory-heavy workloads. The new approach uses explicit node_stat counters and recomputes the cost signal lock-free in prepare_scan_control(). This change also improves the cost model across reclaim gaps.
